sections.section_purpose: To provide detailed pricing information as required by the tender.
sections.response_guidance: Complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender. Reference annexes where required. Include pricing on the basis of: Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), Combination of T&M and Fixed Price, Other.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the commercial terms and conditions of the engagement.
sections.response_guidance: State acceptance of, or proposed deviations from, the draft contract terms. Include details of AIC Obligations as required.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate the supplier's past performance and technical merit.
sections.response_guidance: Provide two or more case studies demonstrating relevant experience. Reference case study files from `case_studies/`. Address evaluation criteria including Methodology, Past Performance, Technical Merit, Pricing, Compliance.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the project management methodology and governance structure.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the project management methodology, governance structure, and reporting approach. Include details on performance management and meeting attendance for performance reviews.

sections.section_purpose: To provide a summary of the company's background and compliance with legal requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Provide a summary of the company's background, size, structure, and relevance to this opportunity. Confirm compliance with Australian Government requirements regarding unpaid employee entitlements.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the proposed solution architecture and management of intellectual property.
sections.response_guidance: Provide a description of the proposed solution architecture, including diagrams where appropriate. Include management of Intellectual Property under this Work Order.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the approach to transition-in and transition-out.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the approach to transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out. Include details on the provision of each Plan as required.

sections.section_purpose: To provide essential submission details and ensure compliance with submission requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Include a PDF copy of the Supplier’s Deed of Undertaking duly signed. Ensure quotations are lodged electronically via AusTender before the Closing Time.
